item.title: Why is Kabra Jewels Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: On 12-Mar, Kabra Jewels Ltd witnessed a notable rise in its share price, climbing 5.74% to ₹95.80 by 09:22 PM. This upward movement reflects a significant outperformance relative to both its sector and the broader market benchmarks. Time: 5 hours ago

item.title: Why is Vishwas Agri Seeds Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: On 12-Mar, Vishwas Agri Seeds Ltd witnessed a notable decline in its share price, closing at ₹37.00, down ₹2.00 or 5.13% from the previous session. This drop reflects ongoing challenges as the stock continues to underperform both its sector and broader market benchmarks. Time: 5 hours ago

item.title: Why is Max Estates Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: On 12-Mar, Max Estates Ltd witnessed a decline in its share price, closing at ₹375.50, down by ₹3.05 or 0.81%. This drop continues a recent downward trend amid mounting concerns over the company’s debt servicing capacity and profitability metrics, despite some positive long-term growth indicators. Time: 5 hours ago

item.title: Why is eMudhra Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: On 12-Mar, eMudhra Ltd’s stock price rose by 3.81% to ₹434.05, continuing a five-day winning streak that has delivered a 6.71% gain over the past week, significantly outperforming the Sensex which declined by 4.98% during the same period. Time: 5 hours ago

item.title: Why is G G Engineering Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: On 12-Mar, G G Engineering Ltd’s stock price fell to a fresh 52-week and all-time low of ₹0.45, continuing a sustained period of underperformance relative to both its sector and the broader market benchmarks. Time: 5 hours ago

item.title: Why is Khaitan (India) Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: On 12-Mar, Khaitan (India) Ltd witnessed a notable rise in its share price, climbing 6.6% to close at ₹98.40. This surge reflects the stock’s robust outperformance relative to both its sector and the broader market benchmarks. Time: 5 hours ago

item.title: Why is Krishana Phoschem Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: On 12-Mar, Krishana Phoschem Ltd’s stock price rose by 2.33% to ₹507.40, reflecting renewed investor confidence driven by the company’s robust financial results and sustained market outperformance over multiple time horizons. Time: 5 hours ago

item.title: Why is Flomic Global Logistics Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: On 12-Mar, Flomic Global Logistics Ltd witnessed a notable rise in its share price, climbing 7.29% to close at ₹44.00. This upward movement reflects a combination of short-term positive momentum and heightened investor participation despite the stock's longer-term challenges. Time: 5 hours ago

item.title: Why is The Jammu & Kashmir Bank Ltd. falling/rising?
item.description: On 12-Mar, The Jammu & Kashmir Bank Ltd. saw its share price rise by 1.71% to close at ₹127.60, continuing a strong upward trend supported by robust long-term growth metrics and increased investor participation. Time: 5 hours ago

item.title: Why is Bajaj Auto Ltd. falling/rising?
item.description: On 12-Mar, Bajaj Auto Ltd. witnessed a decline in its share price, falling by 1.78% to close at ₹9,165.15. This drop comes amid a broader sector downturn and short-term technical pressures, despite the company’s robust long-term fundamentals and market-beating performance. Time: 5 hours ago

item.title: Why is BAMPSL Securities Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: On 12-Mar, BAMPSL Securities Ltd witnessed a decline in its share price, closing at ₹19.00 with a drop of 0.99%, reflecting ongoing technical challenges despite a generally strong long-term performance relative to the benchmark Sensex. Time: 5 hours ago

item.title: Why is Tata Motors Passenger Vehicles Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: On 12-Mar, Tata Motors Passenger Vehicles Ltd witnessed a notable decline in its share price, closing at ₹324.45, down ₹10.9 or 3.25%. This drop reflects ongoing challenges faced by the company, including deteriorating financial results and sustained underperformance relative to market benchmarks. Time: 5 hours ago

item.title: Why is Akzo Nobel India Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: On 12-Mar, Akzo Nobel India Ltd witnessed a price increase of 1.14%, closing at ₹2,922.20, reflecting a short-term positive momentum despite underlying challenges in its financial performance and investor sentiment. Time: 5 hours ago

item.title: Why is Godrej Consumer Products Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: On 12-Mar, Godrej Consumer Products Ltd witnessed a notable decline in its share price, falling by 3.59% to close at ₹1,050.55. This drop reflects a continuation of recent underperformance against both its sector and broader market benchmarks, driven by subdued growth metrics and weakening investor participation. Time: 5 hours ago

item.title: Why is Perfect Infraengineers Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: On 12-Mar, Perfect Infraengineers Ltd’s stock price declined sharply, hitting a new 52-week and all-time low of ₹1.90, reflecting sustained underperformance relative to the broader market and its sector peers. Time: 5 hours ago

item.title: Why is K P R Mill Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: On 12-Mar, K P R Mill Ltd witnessed a significant price increase of 7.96%, closing at ₹875.00, reversing a three-day decline and outperforming its textile sector peers amid heightened volatility and rising investor participation. Time: 5 hours ago

item.title: Why is Eicher Motors Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: On 12-Mar, Eicher Motors Ltd witnessed a notable decline in its share price, falling by 3.89% to close at ₹6,970.00. This drop comes amid broader sector weakness and valuation pressures despite the company’s strong long-term fundamentals and market-beating performance over recent years. Time: 6 hours ago

item.title: Why is Dr Agarwals Eye Hospital Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: As of 12-Mar, Dr Agarwals Eye Hospital Ltd’s stock price rose by 1.35% to ₹4,866, continuing a four-day winning streak that has delivered an 8.75% return over this period. This upward momentum reflects the company’s robust financial performance and sustained long-term growth, which have helped it outperform both its sector and key market benchmarks. Time: 6 hours ago

item.title: Why is Larsen & Toubro Ltd. falling/rising?
item.description: On 12-Mar, Larsen & Toubro Ltd. (L&T) witnessed a notable decline in its share price, falling by 3.06% to close at ₹3,720.95. This drop comes amid a broader short-term underperformance relative to both its sector and benchmark indices, despite the company’s robust long-term fundamentals and attractive valuation metrics. Time: 6 hours ago

item.title: Why is Elgi Equipments Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: On 12 Mar, Elgi Equipments Ltd witnessed a decline in its share price, falling by 1.36% to close at ₹493.55. This movement reflects a short-term underperformance despite the company’s strong long-term fundamentals and positive quarterly results. Time: 6 hours ago
